channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Trash in the street, 1st April
item.description:
This was out for quite a long time now

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Laburnum Street, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly Tipping household items on the public footpath and in the carriageway at the junction of St Andrews Grove and Fairholt Road on Monday., 1st April
item.description:
Fly Tipping household items on the public footpath and in the carriageway at the junction of St Andrews Grove and Fairholt Road on Monday.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Fairholt Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Two black bags of domestic rubbish dumped by the pedestrian crossing on Trafalgar Road a few feet east of Lassell Street, 1st April
item.description:
These have been here for three or four days. Great if you can collect before the Easter weekend. Thank you.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Trafalgar Road, Greenwich
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dumped luggage bags on Seal Street E8, 1st April
item.description:
Hello, please can you remove the dumped luggage bags on Seal Street (pedestrian section)? Thank you

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Seal Street, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Pot hole in pavement, 1st April
item.description:
Further to my report 9212348. You feel it isn't bad enough. The picture of my foot shows otherwise. Lets hope it isn't fractured. The path needs repairing. Lets hope an old person doesn't trip on it. I'm sure a solicitor mayl feel otherwise. Were there is blame,there's a claim. That is down to bromley council now.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Moorfield Road, Goddington, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Old filled up bin dumped, 1st April
item.description:
An old full up bin has been dumped

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): West Park, Eltham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Drain outside 78 Striaghtmsouth blocked, 1st April
item.description:
The drain outside number 78 Striaghtmsouth is blocked with debris.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Straightsmouth, Greenwich
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Blocked drain, 1st April
item.description:
Each of the drains at the junction are blocked - semi permanently. Please can this be fixed.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): East Dulwich Grove, Dulwich Village, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Flytipped office chair on approach to Allendale Close from Daneville Road, 1st April
item.description:
Flytipped office chair on approach to Allendale Close from Daneville Road for collection please.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 80, Allendale Close, Camberwell, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Pavement parking bays, 1st April
item.description:
Out side no. 28 sydney road, a pavement parking bay was re marked last night as was the rest out the street. The new marking is small ,probably not big enough for a car , needs to be corrected, others tickets will be issued for wheels not in the bay. Cannot believe an opperative did this..... Thank you
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Sydney Road, Blendon, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Flytipped crate Allendale Close, 1st April
item.description:
Flytipped crate adjacent to 73 Allendale Close and in front of 72 Allendale Close for removal please. Thank you!

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 76, Allendale Close, Camberwell, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly tipping on the street, 1st April
item.description:
Some one has been fly tipping on the street and it almost fell on my child

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Theydon Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: State of this again, 1st April
item.description:
Fly tipping overflowing bins

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Rippolson Road, Plumstead
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Nitrous oxide canisters, 1st April
item.description:
Four nitrous oxide canisters left by the public bins near the traffic lights outside the train station

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Rectory Road, Beckenham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Outside 44/46 Priory Park Road, 1st April
item.description:
A few random items dumped on road and have been there for 2 weeks now - please can they be removed

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Priory Park Road, London
Report on FixMyStreet
item.category: Fly-tip Small - Less than one bag

item.title: Building Materials Blocking and Damaging Pavement, 1st April
item.description:
A paving company have completely blocked the public footpath and are storing the block paving bricks (and other building materials) on the entire pavement. This is dangerous to the public, is an offence without a licence and is badly damaging the paving stones due to the weight.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Northumberland Avenue, Falconwood, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: This is located outside 1 St Augustine’s Road, Belvedere, Kent, DA17 5HH, 1st April
item.description:
Firstly, someone has dumped a load of rubbish in our green bins and dumped other black bags of rubbish next to the green bins. Secondly, it appears someone has dumped a fridge outside our garage too. The rubbish is overloaded and, thus, we anticipate the rubbish to be disposed of as soon as possible to prevent rats and mice. These two issues are located at 1A St Augustine’s Road, Belvedere, Kent, DA17 5HH. Thirdly, someone has dumped a mattress and a container on heron hill DA17 5HH.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): St Augustines Road, Lower Belvedere, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Two bin bags dumped on pavement, 1st April
item.description:
Two bin bags with contents dumped on pavement

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 11, Abbey Lane, Beckenham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Lime bikes blocking pavement, 1st April
item.description:
C35 Lime bikes blocking pavement/footpath.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 170, Strand, Covent Garden, City of Westminster
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Excessive littering in wilmer place car park, 1st April
item.description:
Excessive litter and public bins full to the brim in Wilmer Place Car Park, N16. The place looks absolutely awful
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Stoke Newington Church Street, London
Report on FixMyStreet
